title: VoidSMP 2 | Vanilla+
description: A simple vanilla+ pack, originally created for the VoidSMP 2 server
body:
VoidSMP 2 | Vanilla+


A simple vanilla+ pack aimed at beautifying the classic Minecraft gameplay loop!

Originally created for the VoidSMP Minecraft server, this pack is perfect for multiplayer, or just a refreshing vanilla experience.

Features:

  • Huge performance boost for both the client and server
  • Plenty of QOL mods
  • Mostly clientside, with a few vanilla friendly exceptions
  • Included resourcepacks, shaders and UI mods to modernise and enhance the classic vanilla look
  • Much more!

This pack includes the Complementary shaderpack, please support the creator here

Please dm aprilthefool on discord if you have any problems or suggestions <3
